entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal grain crop being developed for hybrids in Nigeria

entities.name: NIGERIA
entities.description: The country where the sorghum landraces were collected and evaluated

entities.name: HYBRID DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of creating hybrid sorghum varieties for sustainable agriculture

entities.name: MALE STERILITY
entities.description: A condition where the male reproductive organs are non-functional, essential for hybrid seed production

entities.name: HETEROTIC PARENTAL POOLS
entities.description: Defined groups of parents used to maximize heterosis in hybrid offspring

entities.name: MALE STERILITY INDUCING CYTOPLASM
entities.description: Cytoplasmic factors that induce male sterility in plants

entities.name: LANDRACE COLLECTION
entities.description: The process of gathering indigenous sorghum varieties from various locations

entities.name: TESTCROSS
entities.description: A genetic cross used to identify sterility maintainers and restorers

entities.name: ICS38A
entities.description: A specific male sterile line used in testcrosses

entities.name: ICS24005A
entities.description: A specific male sterile line used in testcrosses

entities.name: STERILITY MAINTAINER
entities.description: The ability of a line to maintain male sterility in the offspring when crossed with male sterile lines

entities.name: RESTORERS
entities.description: Lines that restore fertility to male sterile lines in the offspring

entities.name: SUDAN SAVANNAH
entities.description: An agro-ecological zone in Nigeria characterized by specific sorghum traits

entities.name: GUINEA SAVANNAH
entities.description: An agro-ecological zone in Nigeria characterized by specific sorghum traits

entities.name: GRAIN COLOR
entities.description: The color of the sorghum seed, varying by region

entities.name: PANICLE FORM
entities.description: The physical structure of the sorghum seed head

entities.name: CAUDATUM TYPE
entities.description: A compact elliptic panicle form found in the Sudan Savannah

entities.name: GUINEA TYPE
entities.description: A loose dropping panicle form found in the Guinea Savannah

entities.name: GENOMIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: The study of the genome to reveal genetic diversity and clustering

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The total number of genetic characteristics in the population

entities.name: EUCLIDEAN DISTANCE
entities.description: A mathematical measure used in genomic analysis to determine genetic distance

entities.name: AGRO-ECOLOGIES
entities.description: The environmental conditions of the collection areas

entities.name: NOVEL ALLELES
entities.description: New genetic variants found in landraces used for hybrid parent development

entities.name: HYBRID PARENTS
entities.description: Selected lines used as parents to produce hybrid sorghum
